description: CNC 예지보전 — 엔지니어용 AI 분석 상세

targets.query:
from(bucket: "sensor-scores")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "subsystem_scores")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["site_id"] == "site-A")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["machine_id"] == "cnc-001")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["subsystem"] == "hydraulics")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "reconstruction_error" or r["_field"] == "threshold")
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")

from(bucket: "sensor-scores")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "subsystem_scores")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["site_id"] == "site-A")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["machine_id"] == "cnc-001")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["subsystem"] == "coolant")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "reconstruction_error" or r["_field"] == "threshold")
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")

from(bucket: "sensor-scores")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "subsystem_scores")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["site_id"] == "site-A")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["machine_id"] == "cnc-001")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["subsystem"] == "probe")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "reconstruction_error" or r["_field"] == "threshold")
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")

panels.title: Root Cause 상위 변수 (최근 이상 이벤트)

targets.rawSql: SELECT rc->>'variable' AS variable, ROUND((rc->>'score')::numeric, 3) AS score FROM fault_diagnosis_results, jsonb_array_elements(root_causes) rc ORDER BY diagnosed_at DESC, score DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT fdr.diagnosed_at AS "진단시각", ae.site_id AS "지점", ae.machine_id AS "기계", ae.subsystem AS "서브시스템", fdr.model_name AS "모델", ROUND(fdr.confidence::numeric, 3) AS "신뢰도", fdr.root_causes->0->>'variable' AS "원인1위" FROM fault_diagnosis_results fdr JOIN anomaly_events ae ON fdr.event_id = ae.event_id ORDER BY fdr.diagnosed_at DESC LIMIT 50
SELECT date_trunc('minute', detected_at) AS time, subsystem AS metric, AVG(anomaly_score) AS value FROM anomaly_events WHERE detected_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour' GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

title: 3. Engineering — AI 분석 상세
